Description: Assisted in redesigning the agency’s internal intranet, migrating from Drupal to WordPress for improved usability, security and content management.
Set up and configured a WAMP development environment and implemented custom CSS/JS animations using Elementor and Spectra.
Designed and styled dynamic components such as announcements, events and department pages with responsive layouts.
Integrated backend data using WP Data Access for secure and interactive content management.
Documented custom code and UI standards to support future developers and system maintainers.
Assessed a company’s problem and proposed actionable solutions during a Business Sprint Project, resulting in clear strategic recommendations.
Developed attack and defence strategies for virtual robots using Robocode, strengthening algorithmic robustness and enabling more consistent success in competitive simulations.
Developed a full-stack application through a tech primer, implementing front-end and back-end components to produce a working MVP that provided me with hands on experience.
Provisioned multiple desktops and laptops for new hires, ensuring seamless onboarding.
Delivered effective desktop support and software installation across multiple departments, streamlining IT operations and boosting end-user productivity.
Integrated new systems into the corporate domain and resolved technical issues promptly.
